patch_intent: Handle ChangedCharSetException in JEditorPane.read more robustly by properly resetting or re-obtaining the input stream and handling charset changes.

compatibility_analysis.java_version_differences: No significant Java version differences are expected.

file_mappings.reasoning: The file exists in the target repository and the changes are related to character set handling, which is likely to be present in the target version.

steps.description: Modify the `read(java.io.InputStream, javax.swing.text.Document)` method in `src/java.desktop/share/classes/javax/swing/JEditorPane.java` to include the exception handling and stream reset logic from the patch.
